title: tabebuia × perelegans
intro: Tabebuia × perelegans, also known as the pink poui or the tabebuia tree, is a hybrid plant species within the Bignoniaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids and glycosides, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tabebuia × perelegans include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tabebuia × perelegans can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
